value.description: Value to encode (numeric for EAN/UPC/ITF, alphanumeric for CODE39/CODE128)

width.description: Width of the narrowest bar in px

displayValue.description: Show the human-readable text below the bars

font.description: Font family for the human-readable text

fontSize.description: Font size for the human-readable text

textMargin.description: Vertical gap between bars and text

foreground.description: Bar and text color. Default is black for maximum scannability — CSS variables that flip with dark mode are NOT recommended (most barcode scanners reject light-on-dark)

background.description: Background color. Default is white for maximum scannability. Use 'transparent' to omit

margin.description: Quiet zone in px on each side

onError.description: Fired when input is invalid for the chosen format
